    "Failure to isolate stored energy sources (hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor)",
    "Incomplete lockout/tagout implementation during active work"
  ],

    "Immediately halt all active work on the equipment",
    "Relieve, disconnect, restrain, or otherwise render safe all residual and stored energy",
    "Verify isolation of all energy sources before resuming work"

  "rationale": "Active work is being performed on equipment where stored energy (hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor) has not been isolated or dissipated. This presents an immediate, critical risk of unexpected energization or release of stored energy, which violates OSHA 1910.147 standards.",

    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(5)"
  ]
